name: Audited executable oracle (30 cross-validated cases) v2
description: HONEST oracle. Each data case has an executable ExpectedSql cross-validated (independent authored SQL == hand-authored scalar/rowcount, executed live). Gold projects the NATURAL KEY the copilot returns (TicketNumber, not Id; no SELECT*). Bilingual name-lists (governorates) graded on rowcount only (EN/AR both valid). GoldVerified earned by execution.

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets do we have
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0
Scenarios.GoldSource: cross-validated: independent authored SQL == hand-authored scalar/rowcount, executed live 2026-06-04

Scenarios.Question: how many open tickets are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON t.StatusId=s.Id WHERE s.Name='Open' AND t.IsDeleted=0
Scenarios.GoldSource: cross-validated: independent authored SQL == hand-authored scalar/rowcount, executed live 2026-06-04

Scenarios.Question: how many overdue bills are there
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills WHERE Status='Overdue'
Scenarios.GoldSource: cross-validated: independent authored SQL == hand-authored scalar/rowcount, executed live 2026-06-04

Scenarios.Question: how many customers have no bills at all
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customers c WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Bills b WHERE b.CustomerId=c.Id)
Scenarios.GoldSource: cross-validated: independent authored SQL == hand-authored scalar/rowcount, executed live 2026-06-04

Scenarios.Question: top 5 customers by total billed amount
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 5 c.FullNameEn FROM Customers c JOIN Bills b ON b.CustomerId=c.Id GROUP BY c.Id, c.FullNameEn ORDER BY SUM(b.TotalAmount) DESC
Scenarios.GoldSource: cross-validated: independent authored SQL == hand-authored scalar/rowcount, executed live 2026-06-04

Scenarios.Question: show me ticket TKT-00034
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title FROM Tickets WHERE TicketNumber='TKT-00034' AND IsDeleted=0
